ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate of the data collection site */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate of the data collection site */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded at the site */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage recorded at the site */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded at the site */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction recorded at the site */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall amount recorded during the observation */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Total days of observation */,
  "vulnerability_index" REAL /* Index indicating vulnerability of wildlife */,
  "other_factors" INTEGER /* Other relevant factors affecting wildlife */,
  "ranger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranger collecting the data */,
  "pre1950_data" INTEGER /* Indicator of pre-1950 historical data */,
  "heli_count" INTEGER /* Count of helicopter surveillance conducted */,
  "resource_availability" REAL /* Availability of natural resources at the site */,
  "traffic_condition" TEXT /* Traffic condition around the wildlife area */,
  "burned_area" REAL /* Area that has been burned recently */,
  "wildlife_factor" REAL /* Factor related to wildlife observed */,
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wildlife reserve where the data was collected */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Index indicating the quality of air */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Percentage of soil moisture */,
  "vegetation_index" REAL /* Index indicating the health of vegetation */,
  "water_level" REAL /* Level of water in nearby water bodies */,
  "pollution_level" TEXT /* Level of pollution (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_ranger_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranger_id") REFERENCES rangers ("ranger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rangers" (
  "ranger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranger */,
  "ranger_name" TEXT /* Full name of the ranger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the ranger */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the ranger operates */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the ranger */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the ranger joined the agency */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training the ranger attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wildlife_vulnerability" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wildlife species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "vulnerability_category" TEXT /* Vulnerability category of the species (e.g., endangered, threatened) */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population count of the species */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last population survey */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat the species prefers */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Primary diet of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_management" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., water, food, shelter) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the resource */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status indicating resource availability */,
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wildlife reserve where the resource is located */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource information was last updated */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_conditions" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic condition entry */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic condition */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact on wildlife (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wildlife reserve where the traffic condition is recorded */,
  "last_observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last observation of the traffic condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "burned_areas" (
  "burn_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each burned area record */,
  "area_description" TEXT /* Description of the burned area */,
  "size_acres" REAL /* Size of the burned area in acres */,
  "burn_date" TEXT /* Date when the area was burned */,
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wildlife reserve where the burned area is located */,
  "fire_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the fire (e.g., natural, human-induced) */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Status of the burned area recovery (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("burn_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wildlife_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation record */,
  "ranger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranger making the observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observed species */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the observation */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of individuals observed */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the observation */,
  "observation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the observation (e.g., direct sighting, camera trap) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildlife_observations_ranger_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranger_id") REFERENCES rangers ("ranger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildlife_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES wildlife_vulnerability ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the climate data */,
  "average_temp" REAL /* Average temperature for the year */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation for the year */,
  "climate_category" TEXT /* Category of climate (e.g., dry, wet) */,
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wildlife reserve where the climate data is relevant */,
  "extreme_weather_events" TEXT /* Description of any extreme weather events during the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., population, resource availability) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the historical data */,
  "recorded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was recorded */,
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wildlife reserve where the historical data is relevant */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data (e.g., reports, studies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, ranger, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
